narrative:
Clinton East (precinct in Fulton County) has 797 registered voters, with 47.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 45.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 38.8 percentage points.
